scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (transactions, customers, subscriptions, products); legacy itself ships no writes (capabilities.write is false) and no other resource is modeled.

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented customer creation; Pass B capability expansion
subscription cancellation not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
refund/credit adjustments not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
async report generation not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
webhook event-type catalog, not a syncable object stream
